events.title: Trainer Emiel
events.description: Battle Emiel using one Pokémon. If you win, you may play an additional turn and you receive 10 Master Points!

events.title: Trainer Lieke
events.description: Battle Lieke using one Pokémon. If you win, you may draw two Victory Cards!

events.title: Trainer Joris
events.description: Battle Joris using one Pokémon. If you win, you may battle him again (you may use another Pokémon). You can only battle Joris four times.

events.title: Trainer Annemei
events.description: Battle Annemei using one Pokémon. If you win, you may recharge one ability charge of one of your Pokémon.

events.title: Breeder
events.description: Kanto: Receive a Pokémon from the area you are in. No legends. Johto: Receive one egg of a Pokémon from the area you are in. No legends.

events.title: Teleporter
events.description: You may teleport to another player on another tile. The tile you land on will be triggered instantly.

events.title: Mr. Fuji
events.description: You may give one of your Pokémon to Mr. Fuji, receiving half its value in Master Points (rounded to the nearest 10).

events.title: PokéCenter
events.description: You may instantly heal as many of your Pokémon as you like.

events.title: Trainer Johnny
events.description: Battle Johnny using one Pokémon. If you win, you may draw a Victory Card.

events.title: Trainer Amanda
events.description: Battle Amanda using one Pokémon. If you win, you may draw a Victory Card.

events.title: Trainer Nigel
events.description: Battle Nigel using one Pokémon. If you win, you may draw a Victory Card.

events.title: Trainer Bob
events.description: Battle Bob using one Pokémon. If you win, you may draw a Victory Card.

events.title: Trainer Jack
events.description: Battle Jack using one Pokémon. If you win, you may draw a Victory Card.

events.title: Trainer Joffrey
events.description: Battle Joffrey using one Pokémon. If you win, you may draw a Victory Card.

events.title: Trainer May
events.description: Battle May using one Pokémon. If you win, you may draw a Victory Card and you receive 10 Master Points.

events.title: Trainer Ash
events.description: Battle Ash using one Pokémon. If you win, you may draw a Victory Card and you receive 20 Master Points.

events.title: Event Lass
events.description: Every player has to throw away an item.

events.title: Event
events.description: An angry Voltorb paralyzes you for one turn. You have to skip your next turn.

events.title: Beedrill Attack!
events.description: Run three tiles back! The tile you land on will be triggered instantly.

events.title: PokéMarket
events.description: Throw the dice in order to receive any of these items! 2 = Pokéball, 3 = Bill, 4 = PlusPower, 5 = Master Points Nugget.

events.title: Event
events.description: Oh no! Two wild Magnemite attack you with discharge! One of your Pokémon loses a charge!

events.title: Event Suffocation
events.description: A wild Weezing releases smog, knocking out 2 of your Pokémon.

events.title: Oak's Assistant
events.description: Prof. Oak strives for equality. The player(s) with the lowest amount of Pokéballs can buy a Pokéball from Oak's assistant at the cost of one item. If every player has the same amount of Pokéballs, nobody can buy one. Pokéballs received for free at a Dept. Store do not count as Pokéballs when determining the amount of Pokéballs you have.

events.title: PokéMarket
events.description: Throw the dice in order to receive any of these items! 1,2 = wind item icon, 3 = Defender, 4 = Miracle Stone, 5,6 = boy icon item.

events.title: PokéMarket
events.description: Throw the dice in order to receive any of these items! 1,2 = PlusPower, 3 = Pokéball, 4 = Miracle Stone, 5,6 = Defender.

events.title: Team Rocket!
events.description: Oh no! If you throw 1 to 3, Team Rocket will steal two of your items!

events.title: Team Rocket!
events.description: Oh no! If you throw 1 to 3, Team Rocket will steal 20 of your Master Points!

events.title: Team Rocket!
events.description: Oh no! Team Rocket! Run five tiles forward to escape from them!

events.title: Event Background
events.description: Background image with event card backs marked by question symbols.
